Red Sword (Rock): A blade of unyielding strength. Wielders of this sword are the bulwarks of the community, known for their powerful, decisive actions. In strategic games, this sword always crushes Scissors (agile strategies).
Blue Sword (Scissors): A weapon of precision and cunning. Its bearers are the sharpest minds, capable of cutting through complex problems. This sword's agile tactics are designed to outmaneuver Paper (bureaucratic plans).
Green Sword (Paper): A sword representing strategy and intellect. Wielders are master planners, capable of crafting intricate proposals that cover all possibilities. This blade's comprehensive strategy always envelops Rock (brute force).
Wings: A rare gift granting the power of perspective. Ducks with wings can 'fly' above the daily noise, seeing the bigger picture of the market and community sentiment. They are the visionaries and long-term strategists.
Baby Duck: A companion that signifies a nurturing spirit. These ducks are the mentors and teachers of the Sanctuary, dedicated to onboarding newcomers ('babies') and ensuring the future generation of the flock is strong.
